---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out?

## Which layer does this affect?

- [ ] Adapter (storage / embedding backend)
- [ ] Service (orchestrator business logic)
- [ ] Plugin (optional extension via hooks)
- [ ] Signal source (feed / page / calendar monitor)
- [ ] Action handler
- [ ] API / route
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Docker / infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
